extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters by direction and category: I counted only the “Against the Company,” “Against Subsidiaries,” “Against the Directors,” and “Against Promoters” rows, excluding every “By” row. Criminal proceedings against all listed entities total 0; statutory/regulatory proceedings against the Company and Subsidiaries total 6 + 2 = 8, excluding tax; tax proceedings against the Company and Subsidiaries total 7 + 4 = 11, excluding promoter/director personal matters. The quantified aggregate against the Company and Subsidiaries is taken from the stated amounts of ₹42.73 million and ₹30.18 million, respectively, totaling ₹72.91 million, or ₹7.291 crore; “Not quantifiable” personal matters were excluded. The contingent-liabilities figure uses the stated Total of ₹37.19 million as of November 30, 2022, converted to ₹3.719 crore, without re-summing line items. Company-wide customer concentration for the most recent full fiscal year, Fiscal 2022, is 49.65% for the top five and 64.57% for the top ten, measured as a percentage of revenue from operations. The source tables use ₹ million; conversion to crore is by dividing by 10.
